notes: v0.16.58 — Top bar / RIFT polish. (1) Top bar avatar: ship preview swapped for the player's STEAM AVATAR (medium 64x64, PW fallback while loading). (2) PULSE / SURGE / ENERGY in the top bar now use baked Leonardo PNGs trimmed and uniform-sized, with idle animations (PULSE pulse, SURGE rotate + sparkle, ENERGY pulse + arcs). (3) RIFT picker rewards were under-counting (boss-only × diff mult). Now shows FULL RUN REWARDS: 250/100, 600/250, 1500/600, 3000/1200 + 10 SURGE on BRUTAL. RIFT_BRUTAL_SURGE bumped 5→10. (4) Top-right 'BOSS KEYS · PULSE' duplicate line removed. (5) 'Circle Boss 3/4' placeholder removed. Windows only.
